gaps.title: Tenant isolation leak in ai_agent_assignments
gaps.breaks: One company can see or modify another company's agent assignments
gaps.scenario: Company A queries ai_agent_assignments and sees agents assigned to Company B, potentially exposing sensitive configuration
gaps.prompt: Write a test that verifies tenant isolation in ai_agent_assignments model by: 1) Creating agent assignments for two different companies, 2) Querying the table as company A and verifying only company A's assignments are returned, 3) Attempting to update company B's assignment using company A credentials and verifying it fails

gaps.title: Counter underflow in variant_instances
gaps.breaks: active_tickets_count or total_tickets_handled can go below zero
gaps.scenario: A bug or malicious action decrements active_tickets_count below zero, causing incorrect billing and capacity calculations
gaps.prompt: Write a test for variant_instances that: 1) Creates an instance with active_tickets_count=0, 2) Attempts to decrement active_tickets_count below zero, 3) Verifies the counter cannot go below zero and either throws an error or remains at zero, 4) Tests the same scenario for total_tickets_handled counter

gaps.title: JSON field corruption in variant_instances
gaps.breaks: Corrupted JSON in channel_assignment or capacity_config causes system failures
gaps.scenario: Malformed JSON in channel_assignment field causes the application to crash when trying to parse the configuration
gaps.prompt: Write a test that: 1) Creates a variant_instances record with valid JSON in channel_assignment and capacity_config, 2) Directly updates the database to insert malformed JSON in these fields, 3) Attempts to retrieve and parse these fields, 4) Verifies the system handles this gracefully without crashing and logs appropriate errors

gaps.title: FK cascade delete inconsistency
gaps.breaks: Deleting a variant_instance leaves orphaned records in dependent tables
gaps.scenario: When a company deletes a variant_instance, related records in variant_workload_distribution and ai_token_budgets are not properly cleaned up
gaps.prompt: Write a test that: 1) Creates a variant_instance with related records in variant_workload_distribution and ai_token_budgets, 2) Deletes the variant_instance, 3) Verifies all related records in dependent tables are also deleted (cascade behavior), 4) Tests the same for other FK relationships in the model set

gaps.title: Numeric precision loss in ai_performance_variant_metrics
gaps.breaks: Rounding errors in financial fields cause incorrect billing reports
gaps.scenario: The total_cost_usd field with Numeric(10,4) precision loses precision during calculations, leading to incorrect billing charges
gaps.prompt: Write a test that: 1) Creates multiple performance metrics records with precise monetary values, 2) Performs aggregate calculations (sum, average) on total_cost_usd, 3) Verifies no precision is lost during these operations, 4) Tests edge cases with very small and very large monetary values

gaps.title: Missing status validation in variant_instances
gaps.breaks: Invalid status values bypass validation logic
gaps.scenario: A direct database update sets status to an invalid value like 'invalid_status', bypassing application validation and causing undefined behavior
gaps.prompt: Write a test that: 1) Creates a variant_instances record with a valid status, 2) Directly updates the database to set status to various invalid values, 3) Attempts to retrieve and use this record in the application, 4) Verifies the application either rejects invalid statuses or handles them gracefully without breaking functionality

raw_response:
GAPS FOUND: 6

GAP 1
Severity: CRITICAL
Title: Tenant isolation leak in ai_agent_assignments
What breaks: One company can see or modify another company's agent assignments
Real scenario: Company A queries ai_agent_assignments and sees agents assigned to Company B, potentially exposing sensitive configuration
AI agent prompt: Write a test that verifies tenant isolation in ai_agent_assignments model by: 1) Creating agent assignments for two different companies, 2) Querying the table as company A and verifying only company A's assignments are returned, 3) Attempting to update company B's assignment using company A credentials and verifying it fails

GAP 2
Severity: HIGH
Title: Counter underflow in variant_instances
What breaks: active_tickets_count or total_tickets_handled can go below zero
Real scenario: A bug or malicious action decrements active_tickets_count below zero, causing incorrect billing and capacity calculations
AI agent prompt: Write a test for variant_instances that: 1) Creates an instance with active_tickets_count=0, 2) Attempts to decrement active_tickets_count below zero, 3) Verifies the counter cannot go below zero and either throws an error or remains at zero, 4) Tests the same scenario for total_tickets_handled counter

GAP 3
Severity: HIGH
Title: JSON field corruption in variant_instances
What breaks: Corrupted JSON in channel_assignment or capacity_config causes system failures
Real scenario: Malformed JSON in channel_assignment field causes the application to crash when trying to parse the configuration
AI agent prompt: Write a test that: 1) Creates a variant_instances record with valid JSON in channel_assignment and capacity_config, 2) Directly updates the database to insert malformed JSON in these fields, 3) Attempts to retrieve and parse these fields, 4) Verifies the system handles this gracefully without crashing and logs appropriate errors

GAP 4
Severity: HIGH
Title: FK cascade delete inconsistency
What breaks: Deleting a variant_instance leaves orphaned records in dependent tables
Real scenario: When a company deletes a variant_instance, related records in variant_workload_distribution and ai_token_budgets are not properly cleaned up
AI agent prompt: Write a test that: 1) Creates a variant_instance with related records in variant_workload_distribution and ai_token_budgets, 2) Deletes the variant_instance, 3) Verifies all related records in dependent tables are also deleted (cascade behavior), 4) Tests the same for other FK relationships in the model set

GAP 5
Severity: MEDIUM
Title: Numeric precision loss in ai_performance_variant_metrics
What breaks: Rounding errors in financial fields cause incorrect billing reports
Real scenario: The total_cost_usd field with Numeric(10,4) precision loses precision during calculations, leading to incorrect billing charges
AI agent prompt: Write a test that: 1) Creates multiple performance metrics records with precise monetary values, 2) Performs aggregate calculations (sum, average) on total_cost_usd, 3) Verifies no precision is lost during these operations, 4) Tests edge cases with very small and very large monetary values

GAP 6
Severity: HIGH
Title: Missing status validation in variant_instances
What breaks: Invalid status values bypass validation logic
Real scenario: A direct database update sets status to an invalid value like 'invalid_status', bypassing application validation and causing undefined behavior
AI agent prompt: Write a test that: 1) Creates a variant_instances record with a valid status, 2) Directly updates the database to set status to various invalid values, 3) Attempts to retrieve and use this record in the application, 4) Verifies the application either rejects invalid statuses or handles them gracefully without breaking functionality
